generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and preparedness, I'm glad to see our leaders finally prioritizing civil defense. The new community resilience programs aren't just about security - they're about maintaining our way of life. Remember when we had to scramble during the 2024 blackouts? This ensures we're never caught unprepared again. Our allies are investing in this too - it's our duty to keep pace. #PreparedNation #DutyFirst
